hero.headline: Host a FIFA World Cup 2026™ Public Viewing in Malaysia
hero.subhead: All public screenings of the Tournament in Malaysia require prior written authorization from Total Sports Asia. Register below to begin your licensing process.
hero.ctaPrimary: Apply for a Public Viewing Authorisation

compliance.heading: Public viewings require written permission
compliance.body: Under FIFA regulations, any public exhibition of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Malaysia — including in restaurants, cafés, bars, hotels, malls, fan zones, public squares, stadium overflow, corporate events, and ticketed venues — requires prior written authorization from Total Sports Asia as the licensed commercial rights operator. Unauthorized public screenings may result in enforcement action under Malaysian law and FIFA's commercial rights framework.

venues.title: Venues & Public Spaces
venues.desc: Malls, fan zones, public squares, stadium overflow

steps.title: Submit Your Registration
steps.desc: Complete the online form with your organisation and venue details.

steps.title: TSA Reviews Your Application
steps.desc: Our team will review your venue, scope, and intended audience.

steps.title: Receive Your Written Authorisation
steps.desc: Get your official written authorisation and licensing terms.

steps.title: Host Your Viewing
steps.desc: Compliant, supported, and eligible for TSA promotional channels.

step1.headline: Let's get your public viewing approved
step1.subhead: About 3 minutes. We'll come back to you within 3 working days.

step4.heading: Your Venue
step4.screenSetup: Number of screens and setup type (optional)

step6.heading: Commercial Details
step6.chargesEntry: Will you charge entry or sell tickets?
step6.sellsFnb: Will F&B be sold during viewings?
step6.sponsorshipInterest: Interested in sponsorship or co-branded activation?

step8.heading: Consent & Submit
step8.consentPdpa: I consent to Total Sports Asia Sdn Bhd collecting and processing the personal data I have provided in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (Malaysia) and TSA's Privacy Notice, for the purpose of processing my public viewing application and related communications.
step8.consentCompliance: I understand that hosting a public viewing of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Malaysia without written authorization from Total Sports Asia is a breach of FIFA regulations and may result in enforcement action.

step9.headline: Registration received
step9.body: Thank you. A member of the Total Sports Asia team will be in touch within 3 working days. For urgent enquiries, message us on WhatsApp.

form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.errorNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
form.errorRateLimit: Too many submissions. Please try again later.

whatsapp.heading: Prefer to Talk It Through?
whatsapp.body: Message the Total Sports Asia public viewing team directly on WhatsApp.
whatsapp.prefilledMessage: Hi, I'd like to find out more about a FIFA World Cup 2026 public viewing authorisation.

footer.disclaimer: FIFA World Cup 2026™ is a trademark of FIFA. Total Sports Asia is the licensed commercial rights operator for the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Malaysia.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.description: Total Sports Asia Sdn Bhd Privacy Notice — PDPA 2010 compliance for the FIFA World Cup 2026 public viewing registration portal.

meta.title: Register for FIFA World Cup 2026 Malaysia Public Viewing
meta.description: Official portal for businesses and organisations in Malaysia wishing to host a FIFA World Cup 2026 public viewing. Apply for your authorisation from Total Sports Asia.
meta.privacyDescription: Total Sports Asia Sdn Bhd Privacy Notice for the FIFA World Cup 2026 public viewing registration portal. PDPA 2010 compliant.
